perksWithImages.name: Friends ‘Til the End
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you hook a Survivor that is not the Obsession:
  • The Obsession gains {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K34P02.ExposedDuration}s.
  • You see the Obsession's Aura for {Tunable.K34P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.


Whenever you hook the Obsession, another Survivor:
  • Screams, then you are alerted.
  • Becomes the Obsession.

perksWithImages.name: Languid Touch
perksWithImages.description: Whenever a Survivor within {Tunable.K36P02.RangeFromKiller}m of you scares a Crow, they gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.K36P02.ExhaustedDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K36P02.Cooldown}s.

perksWithImages.name: Quick & Quiet
perksWithImages.description: You hide in Lockers and vault silently. The Killer is not alerted. Cooldown: {Tunable.S02P01.Cooldown}s.

perksWithImages.name: Inner Focus
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever the Killer damages another Survivor, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S31P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You see other Survivors' Scratch Marks.
